channel.title: FilmyChill — New Movies & OTT This Week in Singapore
channel.description: What's worth watching this week in Singapore — new theatre and OTT releases with ratings and verdicts. Updated twice daily.

item.title: Lee Cronin's The Mummy — HBO Max
item.description: HBO Max · English · ★ 8.0 · Must watch — The young daughter of a journalist disappears into the desert without a trace—eight years later, the broken family is shocked when she is returned to them, as…

item.title: Re:ZERO -Starting Life in Another World- — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Japanese · ★ 8.0 · Must watch — Natsuki Subaru, an ordinary high school student, is on his way home from the convenience store when he finds himself transported to another world.

item.title: Idhayam Murali — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Tamil · Just released — verdict soon — A young man navigates the complexities of unrequited love, finding that even as years pass and life takes unexpected turns, certain emotions remain deeply…

item.title: Evil Dead Burn — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.2 · Worth a watch — After her husband's abrupt death, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws. As they transform into Deadites one by one, she comes to discover that the vows she…

item.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Japanese · ★ 8.5 · Must watch — When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

item.title: Wings of Dread — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Chinese · Not enough ratings yet — Air police officer Gu Chaoyang encounters a hijacking crisis on his flight back to China. With his extremely high professional ethics, he fights desperately to…

item.title: Silo — Apple TV
item.description: Apple TV · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

item.title: X-Men '97 — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 8.6 · Must watch — The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a…

item.title: The Eternal Fragrance — Viu
item.description: Viu · Chinese · Not enough ratings yet — When the Sea Calamity strikes and the Divine Tree appears, whoever claims its fruit gains power over all creation, sparking a bloody war among the immortals,…

item.title: Minions & Monsters — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.4 · Decent one-time watch — This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters…

item.title: Supergirl — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.2 · Decent one-time watch — When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an…

item.title: House of the Dragon — HBO Max
item.description: HBO Max · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.

item.title: Dog Man — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Chinese · Not enough ratings yet — Once the frontman of rock band Mazhi Go, Chou Ko-chieh rode his looks and raw talent to instant superstardom.

item.title: The Death of Robin Hood — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.7 · Worth a watch — Grappling with his past after a life of crime and murder, Robin Hood finds himself gravely injured after a battle he thought would be his last.

item.title: Love Has Fireworks — Viu
item.description: Viu · Chinese · Not enough ratings yet — Qian Fei, an employee in a bank, was planning a fulfilling life. But after being abandoned by her fiancé, she had to redefine her life.

item.title: Double Occupancy — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · Tamil · Not enough ratings yet — Rajini transforms between woman by day and man by night, hiding this gender swap from partners creating tangled complications.

item.title: Obsession — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 8.3 · Must watch — After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon…
